note: All source sheets are 1254x1254 RGB PNG. Checkerboard backgrounds are visual only — no true alpha channel. All sheets require alpha conversion and sprite slicing before runtime use.

sheets.description: Ground and terrain base tiles (20 sprites, 4x5 grid)
All building types: CBD, mid-rise, residential, commercial (22 sprites in 5 rows)
sheets.merge_note: Rows 2-5 partially merged by dilation. CBD row (5 sprites) cleanly detected individually.

sheets.description: Landmark buildings with 4 variants each: town_hall, school, hospital, police, station, park_monument
sheets.merge_note: Rows 2-5 fully merged into one region. Town hall row (4 variants) and monument row (3 statues) cleanly detected.

sheets.description: Coastal transition tiles: beach edges+corners, seawall edges+corners, dock planks+edges, cliff edges
sheets.merge_note: Section header text labels detected as separate regions. Some tile groups merged.

sheets.description: Diagonal road tiles (6 types, clean+weathered) and diagonal sidewalk tiles (NE-SW and NW-SE, clean+weathered)
sheets.merge_note: Column header labels detected separately. Road row and sidewalk rows merged by dilation.

sheets.description: Park and landscape props: trees, bushes, benches, fountains, paths, playground, lamps
Roof variants with corner pieces: flat (AC+clean), mansard, terracotta, glass tower, rowhouse parapet, peaked
sheets.merge_note: Top section (flat roof rows) merged into one large region.

sheets.description: Facade overlay kits for 4 city profiles: Manhattan (fire escapes, water tower, stoop, cornice), Barcelona (balconies, chamfer, awning, gate), Paris (balcony, dormer, storefront, lamp, arcade), London (sash window, bay window, chimney, shopfront, fanlight door)
sheets.merge_note: Some kit items within the same profile are merged. 20 named sprites across 13 detected regions.

sheets.description: Street furniture and signage: traffic lights, sign posts, bus shelters, phone booths, fire hydrants, ATMs, newspaper piles
Night and lighting overlays at multiple intensity steps: warm window glow, cold window glow, lamp cone, neon sign (2 colours)
Building shadow/AO overlays (3 sizes: 1x1, 2x1, 2x2) and weathering overlays (graffiti tag, throw-up, rust stain, moss, structural damage)
Simpler 3-storey civic building with column portico (2 variants: standard width and compact)
sheets.merge_note: Both building variants merged into one region. Split approximately at x midpoint.

runtime_sheets.description: Runtime road tile atlas: connectivity bitmask tiles, highway variants, surface conditions, markings, roundabouts, props
Runtime sidewalk tile atlas: connectivity tiles, surface variants, tactile paving, overlays, props
